title: Add read-only installed version status and update check
outOfScope: Update apply, rollback execution, disable/enable, uninstall, purge, release publication, and final plan cleanup.

sources.reason: Defines the read-only version/status/update-check objective and acceptance scenarios.
Existing read-only lifecycle facts are extended with validated installed status.
Installed manifest and version facts are the source of truth for status queries.

riskAssessment.reason: Read-only status must fail closed on missing or invalid installation facts and never mutate the worktree.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized serial execution of all planned Work Items and this read-only status scope is bounded.

preReviewWarnings: Verify missing, malformed, and release-evidence mismatch cases remain read-only fail closed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Read-only status reports the installed version, runtime state, configuration state, conflicts, and rollback availability.
The status model supports all planned lifecycle states without applying changes.
Missing or invalid Manifest/Version/Release Evidence fails closed without modifying the repository.
CLI usage and tests cover current, no-update, update-available, invalid-fact, and non-mutating scenarios.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The repository has lifecycle facts but no decision-grade installed version/status/update-check interface, so operators cannot inspect lifecycle state without re-deriving it or risking mutation.
constraints: Read-only only; do not apply update, rollback, disable, uninstall, or purge operations.
Fail closed when installed facts or release evidence are absent or invalid.
Do not write status, proposals, or runtime files during a check.
intent.rationale: A deterministic read-only status boundary is required before any mutating lifecycle operation can be safely proposed or confirmed.

rawUserRequest: 查收评审，总结，工单列表（列表最后加上：清理执行计划文档），做成修改执行计划的文档。计划里明确写清楚，每个工单要走完整的流程（包括PR，清理分支），然后循环执行下一个工单，直到全部工单完整为止。需要跟我确认的，写清楚，已经得到我的授权。走完当前文档的流程。

declaredIntent.summary: Serially implement the current Installed Lifecycle plan with full Work Item lifecycle closure.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Current version and lifecycle state are reported from validated installed facts without mutation.
No-update and update-available checks are deterministic and read-only.
Missing facts or release evidence mismatch fails closed without modifying the worktree.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized all planned Work Item implementation, verification, PR, merge, closure, and branch cleanup actions.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
